title: Tool Installation Verification Checklist
when_to_use: After any fresh Kali installation or before starting a new engagement

steps.title: Verify Nmap
steps.tip: Nmap is your most important tool. If it's not working, nothing else matters

steps.title: Verify Burp Suite
steps.instruction: Burp Suite: launch from Kali menu, verify proxy starts on 127.0.0.1:8080
steps.tip: Test by configuring Firefox to use the proxy and loading a page through Burp

steps.title: Verify Wireshark
steps.instruction: Wireshark: wireshark --version, test packet capture on any interface
steps.tip: If capture fails, check permissions: you may need to run as root or add user to wireshark group

steps.title: Verify Netcat
steps.instruction: Netcat: nc -h, verify connection and listening modes
steps.tip: Test both: nc -lvp 4444 (listen) in one terminal, nc localhost 4444 (connect) in another

steps.title: Verify Python3
steps.tip: Also verify pip3 works. Install a test package to confirm: pip3 install requests

steps.title: Verify Gobuster
steps.tip: Also verify you have wordlists: ls /usr/share/wordlists/

steps.title: Verify Nikto
steps.instruction: Nikto: nikto -Version, verify Perl dependencies present
steps.tip: If Nikto fails, it's usually a missing Perl module. Install with: apt install libnet-ssleay-perl
